sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 2.5, 3.5), (2, 4.0, 5.0), (3, 3.0, 7.0);
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) AS population_covariance FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET x_value = x_value + 1.0 WHERE i = 2;
SELECT covarPopStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE x_value > 2);
